# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

resources:
- name: staging-postgres-instance
  type: gcp-types/sqladmin-v1beta4:instances
  properties:
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_14
    region: us-central1
    rootPassword: CloudSQL2024!
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
          - value: 0.0.0.0/0
            name: Allow All for Dev
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: false # Backups disabled for staging flexibility/cost
        binaryLogEnabled: false # Also disable for staging
      diskSizeGb: 20
      diskType: PD_SSD
      storageAutoResize: true
      storageAutoResizeLimit: 0
    labels:
      environment: staging
